attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT SXMLOI.MESSAGE_ID, SXMLOI.LINE_IFACE_ID, SXMLOI.TRANSMISSION_DATE, SXMLOI.HOLDING_UNIT_ID, SXMLOI.HOLDING_UNIT_REF, SXMLOI.LINE_NUMBER, SXMLOI.ITEM_NUMBER, SXMLOI.ITEM_REVISION, SXMLOI.PRODUCT_QUANTITY, SXMLOI.RETURN_REASON_CODE, SXMLOI.SHIP_DATE, SXMLOI.UOM, SXMLOI.PALLET_ID, SXMLOI.PROCESS_STATUS, SXMLOI.ATTRIBUTE1, SXMLOI.ATTRIBUTE2, SXMLOI.ATTRIBUTE3, SXMLOI.ATTRIBUTE4, SXMLOI.ATTRIBUTE5, SXMLOI.ATTRIBUTE6, SXMLOI.ATTRIBUTE7, SXMLOI.ATTRIBUTE8, SXMLOI.ATTRIBUTE9, SXMLOI.ATTRIBUTE10, SXMLOI.ATTRIBUTE11, SXMLOI.ATTRIBUTE12, SXMLOI.ATTRIBUTE13, SXMLOI.ATTRIBUTE14, SXMLOI.ATTRIBUTE15, SXMLOI.REQUEST_ID, SXMLOI.CREATION_DATE, SXMLOI.CREATED_BY, SXMLOI.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,SXMLOI.LAST_UPDATED_BY,  SXMLOI.EXPECTED_ARRIVAL_DATE, SXMLOI.GES_UPDATE_DATE, SXMLOI.GLOBAL_NAME, SXMLOI.BATCH_ID,  SXMLOI.CREATE_DATETIME, SXMLOI.ACTION_CODE, 'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_X_MK_3C8_LN_OB_IFACE SXMLOI
WHERE 
NOT EXISTS (
			SELECT 1 
			FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
			WHERE SXMLOI.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
		   ) OR
NOT EXISTS 
		  (
		   SELECT 1
		   FROM $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RTRN_ITMS_FRM_SLC_MFG_PRTNR NRISTMP
		   WHERE NRISTMP.SK_MESSAGE_ID=SXMLOI.MESSAGE_ID
		  ) OR
NOT EXISTS
		 (
		 SELECT 1
		 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
		 WHERE NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID=SXMLOI.ITEM_NUMBER
		 ) OR
NOT EXISTS
		(
		SELECT 1
			 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE NPOL,$$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RTRN_ITMS_FRM_SLC_MFG_PRTNR NRISTMP
             WHERE NPOL.SS_CD ='CG'
             AND NPOL.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM=NRISTMP.PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM             
			AND NPOL.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_NUM_INT=SXMLOI.LINE_NUMBER
		) OR
NOT EXISTS 
		   (
			SELECT 1
			FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SHIPMENT_CARTON NSC             
			WHERE SXMLOI.HOLDING_UNIT_ID = NSC.BK_CARTON_ID
		   )

SELECT
NSC.BK_CARTON_ID AS BK_CARTON_ID,
NRIFSMP.PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM  AS BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
CASE SXMLOI.PROCESS_STATUS WHEN 'C' THEN 'COMPLETED'WHEN 'N' THEN 'NEW' WHEN 'E' THEN 'ERROR' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END  AS PROCESS_STATUS_CD,
CASE SXMLOI.RETURN_REASON_CODE WHEN 'UPA' THEN 'UNKNOWN' WHEN 'CCO' THEN 'CANCEL' WHEN 'DPS' THEN 'RECALL' WHEN 'DPR' THEN 'DAMAGE' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS RETURN_REASON_CD,
COALESCE(SXMLOI.CREATION_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') AS  CREATE_DT,
COALESCE(SXMLOI.SHIP_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') AS  SHIP_DT,
COALESCE(SXMLOI.PRODUCT_QUANTITY,0) AS PRODUCT_QTY,
COALESCE(SXMLOI.TRANSMISSION_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') AS  TRANSMISSION_DT, 
SXMLOI.EXPECTED_ARRIVAL_DATE AS EXPECTED_ARRIVAL_DT,
NRIFSMP.RTRN_ITMS_FRMSLC_MFG_PRTNR_KEY AS RTRN_ITMS_FRMSLC_MFG_PRTNR_KEY,
NP.ITEM_KEY  AS PRODUCT_KEY,
SXMLOI.MESSAGE_ID AS SK_MESSAGE_ID,
SXMLOI.LINE_IFACE_ID AS SK_LINE_IFACE_ID,
FNPL.PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS  PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,  
(CASE WHEN NRIS.BK_CARTON_ID IS NOT NULL  AND NRIS.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM IS NOT NULL  THEN 'U'  ELSE 'I' END) AS DML_TYPE 
FROM 
(SELECT 
SXMLO.PROCESS_STATUS,
SXMLO.RETURN_REASON_CODE,
SXMLO.CREATION_DATE,
SXMLO.SHIP_DATE,
SXMLO.PRODUCT_QUANTITY,
SXMLO.TRANSMISSION_DATE,
SXMLO.MESSAGE_ID,
SXMLO.LINE_IFACE_ID,
SXMLO.GLOBAL_NAME,
SXMLO.ITEM_NUMBER,
SXMLO.LINE_NUMBER,
SXMLO.HOLDING_UNIT_ID,
SXMLO.EXPECTED_ARRIVAL_DATE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_X_MK_3C8_LN_OB_IFACE SXMLO

UNION ALL
SELECT 
EXMLOI.PROCESS_STATUS,
EXMLOI.RETURN_REASON_CODE,
EXMLOI.CREATION_DATE,
EXMLOI.SHIP_DATE,
EXMLOI.PRODUCT_QUANTITY,
EXMLOI.TRANSMISSION_DATE,
EXMLOI.MESSAGE_ID,
EXMLOI.LINE_IFACE_ID,
EXMLOI.GLOBAL_NAME,
EXMLOI.ITEM_NUMBER,
EXMLOI.LINE_NUMBER,
EXMLOI.HOLDING_UNIT_ID,
EXMLOI.EXPECTED_ARRIVAL_DATE
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_X_MK_3C8_LN_OB_IFACE EXMLOI
)SXMLOI
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON SXMLOI.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RTRN_ITMS_FRM_SLC_MFG_PRTNR NRIFSMP
	ON SXMLOI.MESSAGE_ID = NRIFSMP.SK_MESSAGE_ID 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
	ON NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID=SXMLOI.ITEM_NUMBER
INNER JOIN (SELECT NPOL.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM AS BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM , 
NPOL.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_NUM_INT AS BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_NUM_INT,MIN(NPOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY) AS PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY
            FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE NPOL
            WHERE NPOL.SS_CD ='CG'
            GROUP BY NPOL.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM, NPOL.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_NUM_INT) FNPL
			 ON FNPL.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM = NRIFSMP.PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM            
						AND FNPL.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_NUM_INT=SXMLOI.LINE_NUMBER
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SHIPMENT_CARTON NSC             
	ON SXMLOI.HOLDING_UNIT_ID = NSC.BK_CARTON_ID
LEFT JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RETURN_ITEMS_SHIPMENT NRIS
	ON NSC.BK_CARTON_ID = NRIS.BK_CARTON_ID                  
	AND NRIFSMP.PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM=NRIS.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM
